web_text: That which was from the beginning, that which we have heard, that which we have seen with our eyes, that which we saw, and our hands touched, concerning the Word of life (and the life was revealed, and we have seen, and testify, and declare to you the life, the eternal life, which was with the Father, and was revealed to us); that which we have seen and heard we declare to you, that you also may have fellowship with us. Yes, and our fellowship is with the Father, and with his Son, Jesus Christ. And we write these things to you, that our joy may be fulfilled.
slang_text: What was already there from the start, what we've heard, what we've seen with our own eyes, what we watched and touched with our own hands — that's what we're talkin' about, the Word of life (and that life got revealed, and we've seen it, and we're testifyin' to it, declarin' to you the life, the eternal life, that was right there with the Father, and got revealed to us); what we've seen and heard, we're declarin' to you too, so you can join in fellowship with us. Yeah, and our fellowship's with the Father, and with His Son, Jesus Christ. We're writin' you all this so our joy can be totally complete.

web_text: This is the message which we have heard from him and announce to you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all. If we say that we have fellowship with him and walk in the darkness, we lie, and don’t tell the truth. But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus Christ, his Son, cleanses us from all sin. If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
slang_text: Here's the message we heard from Him, and we're announcin' it to you: God's light, no darkness in Him whatsoever. If we say we're in fellowship with Him while we're walkin' around in darkness, we're lyin', not tellin' the truth. But if we walk in the light, same as He's in the light, we're in fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus Christ, His Son, cleans us up from every bit of sin. If we say we got no sin, we're just conning ourselves, and the truth ain't in us.

web_text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us the sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness. If we say that we haven’t sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.
slang_text: If we confess our sins, He's faithful and righteous enough to forgive us for 'em, and clean us up from every bit of wrongdoin'. If we say we never sinned, we're callin' Him a liar, and His word ain't in us.

web_text: My little children, I write these things to you so that you may not sin. If anyone sins, we have a Counselor with the Father, Jesus Christ, the righteous. And he is the atoning sacrifice for our sins, and not for ours only, but also for the whole world. This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments. One who says, “I know him,” and doesn’t keep his commandments, is a liar, and the truth isn’t in him.
slang_text: My little kids, I'm writin' you all this so you don't sin. But if anybody sins, we got a Counselor with the Father — Jesus Christ, the righteous one. And He's the atonin' sacrifice for our sins, and not just ours, but for the whole world too. Here's how we know we actually know Him: if we keep His commandments. Whoever says, "I know Him," but doesn't keep His commandments, is a liar, and the truth ain't in him.

web_text: But whoever keeps his word, God’s love has most certainly been perfected in him. This is how we know that we are in him: he who says he remains in him ought himself also to walk just like he walked. Brothers, I write no new commandment to you, but an old commandment which you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which you heard from the beginning. Again, I write a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you; because the darkness is passing away, and the true light already shines.
slang_text: But whoever keeps His word, God's love's totally been made complete in that person, for sure. Here's how we know we're in Him: whoever says he's stayin' in Him oughta walk exactly like He walked. Brothers, I'm not writin' you some brand-new commandment, but an old commandment you already had from the start. That old commandment's the word you already heard from the beginning. But I'm also writin' you a new commandment, true in Him and in you — 'cause the darkness is fadin' away, and the real light's already shinin'.

web_text: He who says he is in the light and hates his brother, is in the darkness even until now. He who loves his brother remains in the light, and there is no occasion for stumbling in him. But he who hates his brother is in the darkness, and walks in the darkness, and doesn’t know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes. I write to you, little children, because your sins are forgiven you for his name’s sake.
slang_text: Whoever says he's in the light while he hates his own brother is still stuck in the darkness, even now. Whoever loves his brother stays in the light, and there's nothin' to trip him up in there. But whoever hates his brother's in the darkness, walkin' around in the dark, not even knowin' where he's headed, 'cause the darkness has blinded his eyes. I'm writin' you, little kids, 'cause your sins are already forgiven, for His name's sake.

web_text: I write to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I write to you, little children, because you know the Father. I have written to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I have written to you, young men, because you are strong, and the word of God remains in you, and you have overcome the evil one. Don’t love the world or the things that are in the world. If anyone loves the world, the Father’s love isn’t in him. For all that is in the world, the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, isn’t the Father’s, but is the world’s.
slang_text: I'm writin' you, fathers, 'cause you know Him who's been around since the start. I'm writin' you, young guys, 'cause you've beaten the evil one. I'm writin' you, little kids, 'cause you know the Father. I already wrote you, fathers, 'cause you know Him who's been around since the start. I already wrote you, young guys, 'cause you're strong, God's word is stuck in you, and you've beaten the evil one. Don't love this world, or the stuff that's in this world. If anybody loves the world, the Father's love ain't in him. 'Cause everything in this world — fleshly cravings, eye candy cravings, pridin' yourself on what you got — none of that's from the Father, it's all from the world.

web_text: The world is passing away with its lusts, but he who does God’s will remains forever. Little children, these are the end times, and as you heard that the Antichrist is coming, even now many antichrists have arisen. By this we know that it is the final hour. They went out from us, but they didn’t belong to us; for if they had belonged to us, they would have continued with us. But they left, that they might be revealed that none of them belong to us. You have an anointing from the Holy One, and you all have knowledge.
slang_text: This world's fadin' away, cravings and all, but whoever does God's will sticks around forever. Little kids, these are the end times, and same as you heard the Antichrist is comin', a ton of antichrists have already shown up. That's how we know it's the final hour. They walked out on us, but they never really belonged to us — if they had, they'd have stuck around with us. But they bailed, so it'd be plain not one of 'em ever belonged to us. You've got an anointin' from the Holy One, and every one of you's got knowledge.

web_text: I have not written to you because you don’t know the truth, but because you know it, and because no lie is of the truth. Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This is the Antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son. Whoever denies the Son, the same doesn’t have the Father. He who confesses the Son has the Father also. Therefore, as for you, let that remain in you which you heard from the beginning. If that which you heard from the beginning remains in you, you also will remain in the Son, and in the Father.
slang_text: I haven't written you 'cause you don't know the truth, but 'cause you do know it, and 'cause no lie ever comes from the truth. Who's the liar, if not the guy who denies Jesus is the Christ? That's the Antichrist right there, whoever denies the Father and the Son. Whoever denies the Son doesn't got the Father either. Whoever confesses the Son's got the Father too. So, for you guys, let whatever you heard from the start stay stuck in you. If what you heard from the start stays in you, you're gonna stay in the Son and the Father too.

web_text: This is the promise which he promised us, the eternal life. These things I have written to you concerning those who would lead you astray. As for you, the anointing which you received from him remains in you, and you don’t need for anyone to teach you. But as his anointing teaches you concerning all things, and is true, and is no lie, and even as it taught you, you will remain in him. Now, little children, remain in him, that when he appears, we may have boldness, and not be ashamed before him at his coming.
slang_text: This is the promise He promised us: eternal life. I've written you all this about the folks tryin' to lead you astray. As for you, the anointin' you got from Him stays put in you, and you don't need nobody teachin' you. But since His anointin' teaches you about everything, and it's true, no lie in it, and same as it already taught you, you're gonna stay in Him. So now, little kids, stay in Him, so when He shows up, we'll have boldness and won't get ashamed in front of Him when He comes back.

web_text: If you know that he is righteous, you know that everyone who practices righteousness has been born of him.
slang_text: If you know He's righteous, you already know everybody who lives righteous has been born of Him too.

web_text: See how great a love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God! For this cause the world doesn’t know us, because it didn’t know him. Beloved, now we are children of God, and it is not yet revealed what we will be. But we know that, when he is revealed, we will be like him; for we will see him just as he is. Everyone who has this hope set on him purifies himself, even as he is pure. Everyone who sins also commits lawlessness. Sin is lawlessness.
slang_text: Check out how epic a love the Father's given us, that we get called God's own kids! And that's exactly why the world don't know us — 'cause it never knew Him. Beloved, right now we're already God's kids, and what we're gonna turn into hasn't even gotten revealed yet. But we know when He gets revealed, we're gonna be like Him, 'cause we're gonna see Him exactly as He is. Everybody who's got this hope pinned on Him purifies himself, same as He's pure. Everybody who sins is committin' lawlessness too — sin IS lawlessness.

web_text: You know that he was revealed to take away our sins, and in him is no sin. Whoever remains in him doesn’t sin. Whoever sins hasn’t seen him and doesn’t know him. Little children, let no one lead you astray. He who does righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous. He who sins is of the devil, for the devil has been sinning from the beginning. To this end the Son of God was revealed: that he might destroy the works of the devil.
slang_text: You already know He got revealed to take away our sins, and there's no sin in Him whatsoever. Whoever stays in Him doesn't sin. Whoever sins ain't seen Him, don't know Him. Little kids, don't let nobody lead you astray. Whoever lives righteous is righteous, same as He's righteous. Whoever sins belongs to the devil, 'cause the devil's been sinnin' since the very beginning. That's exactly why the Son of God got revealed: to wreck the devil's whole operation.

web_text: Whoever is born of God doesn’t commit sin, because his seed remains in him; and he can’t sin, because he is born of God. In this the children of God are revealed, and the children of the devil. Whoever doesn’t do righteousness is not of God, neither is he who doesn’t love his brother. For this is the message which you heard from the beginning, that we should love one another; unlike Cain, who was of the evil one, and killed his brother. Why did he kill him? Because his deeds were evil, and his brother’s righteous.
slang_text: Whoever's born of God doesn't commit sin, 'cause God's own seed stays stuck in him, and he can't sin, 'cause he's born of God. That's how you can tell God's kids apart from the devil's kids. Whoever doesn't live righteous ain't from God, and neither is whoever doesn't love his brother. 'Cause this is the message you heard from the start — we oughta love each other, not like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and killed his own brother. Why'd he kill him? 'Cause his own deeds were evil, and his brother's deeds were righteous.

web_text: Don’t be surprised, my brothers, if the world hates you. We know that we have passed out of death into life, because we love the brothers. He who doesn’t love his brother remains in death. Whoever hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life remaining in him. By this we know love, because he laid down his life for us. And we ought to lay down our lives for the brothers.
slang_text: Don't be shocked, my brothers, if the world hates you. We know we've already passed outta death into life, 'cause we love the brothers. Whoever doesn't love his brother's still stuck in death. Whoever hates his brother's a murderer, and you already know no murderer's got eternal life stuck in him. This is how we know what love is: He laid down His own life for us. And we oughta lay down our lives for the brothers too.

web_text: But whoever has the world’s goods, and sees his brother in need, and closes his heart of compassion against him, how does God’s love remain in him? My little children, let’s not love in word only, or with the tongue only, but in deed and truth. And by this we know that we are of the truth, and persuade our hearts before him, because if our heart condemns us, God is greater than our heart, and knows all things.
slang_text: But whoever's got the world's stuff, and sees his brother in need, and shuts his own heart off from him — how's God's love supposed to be stayin' in that guy? My little kids, let's not just love with words or talk — let's love with real deeds and truth. And this is how we know we're of the truth, and how we settle our hearts down in front of Him: if our heart condemns us, God's bigger than our heart, and He knows everything.

web_text: Beloved, if our hearts don’t condemn us, we have boldness toward God; and whatever we ask, we receive from him, because we keep his commandments and do the things that are pleasing in his sight. This is his commandment, that we should believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love one another, even as he commanded. He who keeps his commandments remains in him, and he in him. By this we know that he remains in us, by the Spirit which he gave us.
slang_text: Beloved, if our hearts don't condemn us, we've got boldness in front of God, and whatever we ask, we get from Him, 'cause we keep His commandments and do what pleases Him. Here's His commandment: believe in the name of His Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other, same as He ordered. Whoever keeps His commandments stays in Him, and He stays in that person. This is how we know He stays in us: through the Spirit He gave us.

web_text: Beloved, don’t believe every spirit, but test the spirits, whether they are of God, because many false prophets have gone out into the world. By this you know the Spirit of God: every spirit who confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is of God, and every spirit who doesn’t confess that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is not of God, and this is the spirit of the Antichrist, of whom you have heard that it comes. Now it is in the world already. You are of God, little children, and have overcome them; because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.
slang_text: Beloved, don't believe every spirit — test the spirits out, see if they're from God, 'cause a ton of bogus prophets have already gone out into the world. Here's how you know God's Spirit: every spirit that admits Jesus Christ came in the flesh is from God, and every spirit that won't admit Jesus Christ came in the flesh ain't from God — that's the spirit of the Antichrist, the one you already heard was comin'. And check it out, it's already out there in the world. You're from God, little kids, and you've already beaten 'em, 'cause the One who's in you is way bigger than the one who's in the world.

web_text: They are of the world. Therefore they speak of the world, and the world hears them. We are of God. He who knows God listens to us. He who is not of God doesn’t listen to us. By this we know the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error. Beloved, let us love one another, for love is of God; and everyone who loves has been born of God, and knows God. He who doesn’t love doesn’t know God, for God is love.
slang_text: They're from the world. That's why they talk like the world, and the world listens to 'em. We're from God. Whoever knows God listens to us. Whoever's not from God don't listen to us. That's how we tell apart the spirit of truth and the spirit of error. Beloved, let's love each other, 'cause love's from God, and everybody who loves has been born of God and knows God. Whoever doesn't love doesn't know God, 'cause God IS love.

web_text: By this God’s love was revealed in us, that God has sent his one and only Son into the world that we might live through him. In this is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us, and sent his Son as the atoning sacrifice for our sins. Beloved, if God loved us in this way, we also ought to love one another. No one has seen God at any time. If we love one another, God remains in us, and his love has been perfected in us.
slang_text: This is how God's love got revealed in us: God sent His one and only Son into the world so we could live through Him. This is love — not that we loved God, but that He loved us, and sent His Son as the atonin' sacrifice for our sins. Beloved, if God loved us that hard, we oughta love each other too. Nobody's ever seen God, not once. If we love each other, God stays in us, and His love's made complete in us.

web_text: By this we know that we remain in him and he in us, because he has given us of his Spirit. We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son as the Savior of the world. Whoever confesses that Jesus is the Son of God, God remains in him, and he in God. We know and have believed the love which God has for us. God is love, and he who remains in love remains in God, and God remains in him.
slang_text: This is how we know we stay in Him and He stays in us: He's handed us His own Spirit. We've seen it, and we testify that the Father sent the Son as the world's Savior. Whoever admits Jesus is the Son of God, God stays in that person, and they stay in God. We know it, and we believe it, the love God's got for us. God IS love, and whoever stays in love stays in God, and God stays in him.

web_text: In this love has been made perfect among us, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment, because as he is, even so are we in this world. There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear, because fear has punishment. He who fears is not made perfect in love. We love him, because he first loved us. If a man says, “I love God,” and hates his brother, he is a liar; for he who doesn’t love his brother whom he has seen, how can he love God whom he has not seen?
slang_text: This is how love's been made complete among us, so we'd have boldness on judgment day — 'cause the way He is, that's how we are too, right here in this world. There's no fear in love, but perfect love kicks fear right out the door, 'cause fear comes with punishment attached. Whoever's scared hasn't been made complete in love. We love Him 'cause He loved us first. If some guy says, "I love God," but hates his own brother, he's a liar — 'cause whoever don't love his brother, who he's actually seen, how's he supposed to love God, who he's never seen?

web_text: This commandment we have from him, that he who loves God should also love his brother.
slang_text: And this is the commandment we got from Him: whoever loves God oughta love his brother too.

web_text: Whoever believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God. Whoever loves the Father also loves the child who is born of him. By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God and keep his commandments. For this is loving God, that we keep his commandments. His commandments are not grievous. For whatever is born of God overcomes the world. This is the victory that has overcome the world: your faith.
slang_text: Whoever believes Jesus is the Christ has been born of God. Whoever loves the Father loves His kid too. This is how we know we love God's kids: when we love God and keep His commandments. 'Cause this is what lovin' God actually is — keepin' His commandments. And His commandments ain't a drag. 'Cause whatever's born of God beats the world. And this is the victory that beat the world: your faith.

web_text: Who is he who overcomes the world, but he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God? This is he who came by water and blood, Jesus Christ; not with the water only, but with the water and the blood. It is the Spirit who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth. For there are three who testify: the Spirit, the water, and the blood; and the three agree as one.
slang_text: Who beats the world, if not whoever believes Jesus is the Son of God? This is the guy who came through water and blood, Jesus Christ — not just water, but water and blood both. And it's the Spirit who testifies, 'cause the Spirit IS the truth. 'Cause there's three who testify: the Spirit, the water, and the blood — and all three line up as one.

web_text: If we receive the witness of men, the witness of God is greater; for this is God’s testimony which he has testified concerning his Son. He who believes in the Son of God has the testimony in himself. He who doesn’t believe God has made him a liar, because he has not believed in the testimony that God has given concerning his Son. The testimony is this, that God gave to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son. He who has the Son has the life. He who doesn’t have God’s Son doesn’t have the life.
slang_text: If we take human witnesses seriously, God's witness is way bigger — 'cause this is God's own testimony, testifyin' about His Son. Whoever believes in the Son of God's got the testimony stuck right in him. Whoever won't believe God's basically callin' Him a liar, 'cause he won't believe the testimony God gave about His Son. Here's the testimony: God gave us eternal life, and this life's in His Son. Whoever's got the Son's got the life. Whoever ain't got God's Son ain't got the life.

web_text: These things I have written to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, that you may know that you have eternal life, and that you may continue to believe in the name of the Son of God. This is the boldness which we have toward him, that, if we ask anything according to his will, he listens to us. And if we know that he listens to us, whatever we ask, we know that we have the petitions which we have asked of him. If anyone sees his brother sinning a sin not leading to death, he shall ask, and God will give him life for those who sin not leading to death. There is a sin leading to death. I don’t say that he should make a request concerning this.
slang_text: I've written all this to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, so you'd know you got eternal life, and so you'd keep believin' in the name of the Son of God. And here's the boldness we got with Him: if we ask for anything that matches His will, He listens to us. And if we know He listens, whatever we ask, we know we already got what we asked Him for. If anybody sees his brother sinnin' a sin that ain't leadin' to death, he oughta pray, and God's gonna give life to folks who sin like that. But there's a sin that leads to death — I'm not sayin' you should pray about that one.

web_text: All unrighteousness is sin, and there is a sin not leading to death. We know that whoever is born of God doesn’t sin, but he who was born of God keeps himself, and the evil one doesn’t touch him. We know that we are of God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one. We know that the Son of God has come, and has given us an understanding, that we know him who is true, and we are in him who is true, in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and eternal life.
slang_text: All wrongdoin's sin, sure, but there's sin that don't lead to death. We know whoever's born of God doesn't sin, 'cause whoever's born of God keeps himself in check, and the evil one can't touch him. We know we're from God, and the whole world's stuck under the evil one's control. We know the Son of God's already come, and He's given us the understandin' to know the One who's real, and we're in Him who's real, in His Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and this is eternal life.

web_text: Little children, keep yourselves from idols.
slang_text: Little kids, steer clear of idols.
